compiled_state.title: Step 1: finish read-path single-source-of-truth extraction (search + ready into packages)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Lift search()/_haystack() from ticket-search.py into ticket_reducer; lift find_ready_tickets()/blocked_by from ticket-ready.py into ticket_graph. Rewrite the hyphenated CLI scripts (and ticket-ready.sh chain) as thin shims. Pure refactor: zero output change, existing + extended parity tests green. Part of the recommendation-#2 native-reads plan.

comments.body: Step 1 implemented and committed (refactor commit on main). search_states -> ticket_reducer/search.py; find_ready_tickets -> ticket_graph/_ready.py; scripts are now shims. 43 interface parity tests + 7 bash ready-dispatcher tests + unit tests green, identical to pre-change baseline. NOTE: close is gated by verify.require_verdict_for_close — leaving in_progress pending verdict/your call.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Verified complete (2026-06-15). SSOT extraction landed: search()/_haystack now live in the native reducer package (src/rebar/reducer/search.py) and find_ready_tickets in graph/_ready.py; the hyphenated CLI scripts are thin shims. (Packages were later renamed ticket_reducer->reducer, ticket_graph->graph by downstream refactors, but the extraction is intact.) 164 interface search/ready/parity tests pass; full non-integration suite green (1814 passed, 7 skipped). Closing — verdict-for-close gate not active in this environment.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
